home.title: AI-Powered Quant Strategy Research
home.subtitle: Describe a trading strategy in natural language. The agent generates code, runs backtests, and optimizes — all in real time.

aiAgent.title: AI Agent
aiAgent.desc: Natural language strategy generation with ReAct reasoning

builtinBacktest.title: Built-in Backtest
builtinBacktest.desc: 7 data sources across A-shares, US/HK & Crypto

realtimeStreaming.title: Real-time Streaming
realtimeStreaming.desc: Watch the agent think, call tools, and iterate

strategyReplay.title: Strategy Replay
strategyReplay.desc: Trade journal analyzer + Shadow Account — extract your rules, backtest them, attribute PnL delta

alphaZoo.title: Alpha Zoo
alphaZoo.subtitle: {{count}} pre-built quant alphas across 4 zoos
alphaZoo.description: Browse formula-driven cross-sectional signals from Qlib, the Kakushadze 101 set, GTJA 191, and the academic anomaly literature. Click any alpha to read its formula and source code, or run a bench to score the whole zoo on a universe and period.
alphaZoo.decayTooltip: Predictive half-life: trading days before the signal's edge decays
alphaZoo.noMatch: No alphas match the current filters.

zoos.qlib: Microsoft Qlib's full 158-feature library covering momentum, volatility, volume and rolling statistical signals.
zoos.kakushadze: The 101 formulaic alphas from Kakushadze (2015); short-horizon cross-sectional signals.
zoos.gtja: Guotai Junan Securities' 191 alphas; technical and microstructure signals tuned to China A-share markets.
zoos.academic: Curated long-horizon anomalies from the academic literature (value, momentum, quality, low-vol, etc.).

bench.title: Benchmark runner
bench.subtitle: Score a zoo on a universe
bench.description: Computes IC / IR for every alpha in the selected zoo over the chosen universe and period, then bucketizes them as alive / reversed / dead.
bench.trySuggestion: Try `sp500` or `csi300` for a meaningful cross-sectional IC.

runDetail.notFoundHint: The run directory may have been removed, or your browser may not have API access configured. Check that the API authentication key is set in Settings if accessing remotely.
runDetail.noChartHint: The backtest engine may not have generated price data. Check the artifacts/ directory.

compare.title: Strategy Comparison
compare.hint: Select two runs to compare their metrics.

validation.shuffledDesc: Shuffled trade order {{count}} times to test if Sharpe is better than random.
validation.bootstrapDesc: Resampled daily returns {{count}} times to estimate {{level}}% confidence interval.
validation.walkForwardDesc: Split into {{windows}} sequential windows to check performance consistency.

chat.timeoutError: Execution timed out. Try simplifying the strategy or reducing the number of assets.
chat.apiError: API call failed. Please retry later.
chat.pineInstructions: TradingView Pine Editor → New blank indicator → Paste code → Add to Chart
chat.connectHint: Connect this profile to enable connector runtime
chat.noMandate: No active mandate. Ask the agent to propose one, then commit it before starting the connector runtime.
chat.connectorHint: The connector channel stays read-only until OAuth succeeds and a mandate is committed.
chat.adjustPlaceholder: e.g. keep this but raise the daily cap to 10
chat.commitFailed: Cannot commit mandate: connector broker is missing. Ask the agent to regenerate the proposal.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure model credentials and market data source tokens for this local project.

localApi.title: Local API access
localApi.description: For remote or private Web UI deployments, enter the server API key once in this browser. Localhost use can stay blank.
localApi.placeholder: Stored only in this browser. Leave blank to clear it.

llm.title: LLM Settings
llm.description: Choose the model used by the agent and save it to the project-local agent/.env file.
llm.providerHint: Changing providers updates the recommended model and endpoint.
llm.modelHint: Use the exact model id required by your provider.
llm.noKeyRequired: This provider does not require an API key.
llm.reasoningHint: How hard the model thinks before answering. Higher is more thorough but slower; leave Off for fastest replies.
llm.keyKeepCurrent: Leave blank to keep the current key

dataSource.title: Data Source Settings
dataSource.description: Configure optional market data credentials used by backtests and research agents.
dataSource.tushareHint: Used for China A-share, futures, fund, and macro data. If unset, the project falls back to AKShare where available.
dataSource.tokenKeepCurrent: Leave blank to keep the current token

settings.dataSourceSaveFailed: Failed to save data source settings: {{error}}
settings.dataSourceLoadFailed: Failed to load data source settings: {{error}}

welcome.title: Vibe-Trading
welcome.subtitle: vibe trading with your professional financial agent team
welcome.prompt: Describe a trading strategy to get started.

crossMarket.title: Cross-Market Portfolio
crossMarket.desc: A-shares + crypto + US equities with risk-parity optimizer

btcMacd.title: BTC 5-Min MACD Strategy
btcMacd.desc: Minute-level crypto backtest with real-time OKX data

usTech.title: US Tech Max Diversification
usTech.desc: Portfolio optimizer across FAANG+ via yfinance

investmentCommittee.title: Investment Committee Review
investmentCommittee.desc: Multi-agent debate: long vs short, risk review, PM decision

quantDesk.title: Quant Strategy Desk
quantDesk.desc: Screening → factor research → backtest → risk audit pipeline

earnings.title: Analyze an Earnings Report PDF
earnings.desc: Upload a PDF and ask questions about the financials

macro.title: Web Research: Macro Outlook
macro.desc: Read live web sources for macro analysis

brokerExport.title: Analyze My Broker Export
brokerExport.desc: Parse 同花顺/东财/富途/generic CSV — holding days, win rate, PnL ratio, hourly distribution

behaviorBiases.title: Diagnose My Behavior Biases
behaviorBiases.desc: Disposition effect, overtrading, chasing momentum, anchoring — severity + numeric evidence

checkConnector.title: Check Selected Connector
checkConnector.desc: List connector profiles and verify the selected one

analyzePortfolio.title: Analyze Connector Portfolio
analyzePortfolio.desc: Read account summary and positions from the selected connector

quoteTrend.title: Quote & Trend
quoteTrend.desc: Fetch a quote plus recent daily bars through the selected connector

trainShadow.title: Train My Shadow from Journal
trainShadow.desc: Extract your strategy rules from a broker CSV and persist a Shadow profile

leavingOnTable.title: How Much Am I Leaving on the Table?
leavingOnTable.desc: Backtest your shadow strategy and attribute delta vs. your actual PnL

shadowReport.title: Generate Shadow Report
shadowReport.desc: 8-section HTML/PDF — equity curve, per-market Sharpe, attribution waterfall

agent.placeholder: e.g. Create a dual MA crossover strategy for 000001.SZ, backtest 2024
agent.goalPlaceholder: Describe the research goal to attach to this session
agent.sendFailed: Failed to send message, please retry.
agent.connectorHalted: Connector runtime halted — runner stopped, resting orders cancelled
agent.execNotAllowed: Executables and archives are not allowed

aiLog.title: AI Interaction Log
aiLog.subtitle: View all LLM interactions: prompts, responses, and token usage
aiLog.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all logs? This cannot be undone.
aiLog.noToolCalls: No tool calls in this round
aiLog.inProgress: In progress, waiting for next round...
aiLog.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this log? This action cannot be undone.
